_meta.description: Per-token overrides for display name, subtype, or any field the auto-discovery got wrong. Address-keyed. Only fields you set here override the cron's auto-discovered values; everything else falls through.

schema.notes: free text — shown on the catalog view page
schema.flags_added: extra flags to add to scoring.flags
schema.warning: free text — shown prominently if present (for tokens that have a real risk)

_example_wBTCatom_disabled._note: REMOVE THE LEADING UNDERSCORE TO ACTIVATE. This is an example showing how to override a specific token. Replace the key with the actual wBTC.atom address when known.
_example_wBTCatom_disabled.notes: Bridged via Skip.go / Eureka IBC route from Cosmos Hub. The .atom suffix is critical — wBTC.axl and wBTC.osmo exist on Terra too and are different tokens. Confirm address before any swap.
_example_wBTCatom_disabled.warning: Multiple wBTC variants exist on Terra. The Eris UI label '.atom' is the bridge identity. Do not confuse with wBTC.axl or wBTC.osmo.

_curation_queue.description: Tokens we want to override but haven't filled in the address yet. Move to 'tokens' above when ready.

candidates.hint: wBTC.atom (Terra) — bridged from Cosmos Hub via Skip/Eureka. ibc/88386AC4...F484CB on Babylon — Terra-side address TBD.
wBTC.axl (Terra) — bridged via Axelar. No CoinGecko mapping.
wBTC.osmo (Terra) — bridged via Osmosis. No CoinGecko mapping.
